description: Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy profiles comparing active rhomboid RHBDL2 (7 TMs, catalytic dyad) vs pseudoprotease UBAC2 (3 TMs, no catalytic residues)
code:
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches

# Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy scale
kd_scale = {
    'A': 1.8, 'R': -4.5, 'N': -3.5, 'D': -3.5, 'C': 2.5,
    'Q': -3.5, 'E': -3.5, 'G': -0.4, 'H': -3.2, 'I': 4.5,
    'L': 3.8, 'K': -3.9, 'M': 1.9, 'F': 2.8, 'P': -1.6,
    'S': -0.8, 'T': -0.7, 'W': -0.9, 'Y': -1.3, 'V': 4.2
}

def hydropathy(seq, window=19):
    """Compute Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy with sliding window"""
    values = [kd_scale.get(aa, 0) for aa in seq]
    result = []
    half = window // 2
    for i in range(len(values)):
        start = max(0, i - half)
        end = min(len(values), i + half + 1)
        result.append(np.mean(values[start:end]))
    return result

# Sequences (from previous fetch)
ubac2_seq = ""

rhbdl2_seq = ""

# Compute hydropathy
ubac2_hydro = hydropathy(ubac2_seq)
rhbdl2_hydro = hydropathy(rhbdl2_seq)

# Create figure
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(16, 10), sharex=False)

# --- RHBDL2 (active rhomboid) ---
ax = axes[0]
positions = list(range(1, len(rhbdl2_seq)+1))
ax.fill_between(positions, rhbdl2_hydro, 0, where=[h>0 for h in rhbdl2_hydro], 
                color='#4CAF50', alpha=0.3, label='Hydrophobic')
ax.fill_between(positions, rhbdl2_hydro, 0, where=[h<=0 for h in rhbdl2_hydro], 
                color='#2196F3', alpha=0.3, label='Hydrophilic')
ax.plot(positions, rhbdl2_hydro, color='#1B5E20', linewidth=1.2)
ax.axhline(y=0, color='gray', linestyle='-', linewidth=0.5)
ax.axhline(y=1.6, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5, label='TM threshold')

# Mark TM regions
tm_rhbdl2 = [(72,92), (128,148), (159,179), (183,203), (212,232), (245,265), (278,298)]
for i, (s, e) in enumerate(tm_rhbdl2):
    ax.axvspan(s, e, alpha=0.15, color='orange')
    ax.text((s+e)/2, 3.2, f'TM{i+1}', ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')

# Mark catalytic residues
ax.annotate('Ser187\n(GxSG)', xy=(187, rhbdl2_hydro[186]), xytext=(187, -2.5),
           arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=2),
           fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='red', ha='center')
ax.annotate('His250', xy=(250, rhbdl2_hydro[249]), xytext=(250, -2.5),
           arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='darkblue', lw=2),
           fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='darkblue', ha='center')

ax.set_ylabel('Hydropathy Score', fontsize=11)
ax.set_title('RHBDL2 — Active Rhomboid Protease (303 aa, 7 TM segments)\nCatalytic Ser-His dyad PRESENT', 
            fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='#1B5E20')
ax.set_xlim(1, max(len(rhbdl2_seq), len(ubac2_seq))+5)
ax.set_ylim(-3.5, 3.8)
ax.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=8)

# --- UBAC2 (pseudoprotease) ---
ax = axes[1]
positions = list(range(1, len(ubac2_seq)+1))
ax.fill_between(positions, ubac2_hydro, 0, where=[h>0 for h in ubac2_hydro], 
                color='#FF7043', alpha=0.3, label='Hydrophobic')
ax.fill_between(positions, ubac2_hydro, 0, where=[h<=0 for h in ubac2_hydro], 
                color='#42A5F5', alpha=0.3, label='Hydrophilic')
ax.plot(positions, ubac2_hydro, color='#BF360C', linewidth=1.2)
ax.axhline(y=0, color='gray', linestyle='-', linewidth=0.5)
ax.axhline(y=1.6, color='red', linestyle='--', linewidth=0.8, alpha=0.5, label='TM threshold')

# Mark TM regions
tm_ubac2 = [(92, 112), (126, 146), (164, 184)]
for i, (s, e) in enumerate(tm_ubac2):
    ax.axvspan(s, e, alpha=0.15, color='orange')
    ax.text((s+e)/2, 3.2, f'TM{i+1}', ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold')

# Mark UBA domain
ax.axvspan(304, 344, alpha=0.2, color='#9C27B0')
ax.text(324, 3.2, 'UBA', ha='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', color='#6A1B9A')

# Mark LIR
ax.axvspan(275, 278, alpha=0.3, color='#FFC107')
ax.text(276, 3.2, 'LIR', ha='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='#F57F17')

# Mark where catalytic residues are ABSENT
ax.annotate('No GxSG\nin any TM', xy=(138, 2.0), fontsize=10, color='red', 
           fontweight='bold', ha='center',
           bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFCDD2', edgecolor='red', alpha=0.9))

# Mark the cytoplasmic tail is hydrophilic (no additional TMs)
ax.annotate('Cytoplasmic tail\n(no TM4-7)', xy=(260, -2.5), fontsize=9, color='#B71C1C',
           ha='center', fontstyle='italic')

ax.set_xlabel('Residue Position', fontsize=11)
ax.set_ylabel('Hydropathy Score', fontsize=11)
ax.set_title('UBAC2 — Rhomboid Pseudoprotease (344 aa, only 3 TM segments)\nCatalytic residues ABSENT — NOT a serine endopeptidase', 
            fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='#BF360C')
ax.set_xlim(1, max(len(rhbdl2_seq), len(ubac2_seq))+5)
ax.set_ylim(-3.5, 3.8)
ax.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=8)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('ubac2_vs_rhbdl2_hydropathy.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Hydropathy comparison plot saved.")
